issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: Hi! If your mock interview stopped because a payment failed or an amount was deducted incorrectly, you can refresh the page and retry the payment. If any amount was deducted incorrectly, it will be refunded within 5–10 business days. If the mock interview itself stopped unexpectedly and you need help confirming what happened, please contact the human support team with the time of the issue and any payment details.
justification: The relevant guidance is in "Subscriptions, Payments, and Billing FAQs Mock interviews Subscription plans," which states that failed payments should be retried and incorrect deductions are refunded within 5–10 business days. The exact cause of the mock interview stopping is ambiguous, so a human support follow-up is appropriate.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: Hi! If you have an active individual self-serve monthly subscription that started at least 30 days ago, you can pause it from Settings > Billing. Click the Cancel Plan button, choose a pause duration between 1 and 12 months, and then confirm the pause. If you try to log in during the paused period, you won’t be able to access your account until you resume the plan early from the Billing page.
justification: The issue matches the Pause Subscription process in "Pause Subscription" and the steps and prerequisites are fully described there. The subscription pause feature is located under the settings product area.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: Hello! To dispute a charge, the cardholder contacts their issuer to question the charge on their billing statement. If you are the merchant, your acquirer will contact you for an accurate copy of the transaction record, and you should promptly fax or mail a clear, legible copy to keep the process on track. If you meant a different type of charge dispute, please let us know which side of the transaction you are on so we can guide you more precisely.
justification: The answer is covered by "Dispute Resolution," which explains the dispute process and the merchant response steps. The ticket is about disputing a charge, and the available support path is under the small_business area in "Visa India Support."

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: Hi! Anthropic’s bots respect robots.txt, and you can block crawling by adding a top-level robots.txt rule such as `User-agent: ClaudeBot` followed by `Disallow: /` for each subdomain you want to opt out from. If you only want to limit crawling rather than block it entirely, you can also use the non-standard `Crawl-delay` extension in robots.txt, for example `User-agent: ClaudeBot` and `Crawl-delay: 1`.
justification: The article "Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?" directly explains how site owners can opt out or limit crawling using robots.txt and Crawl-delay. This fully answers the request without needing escalation.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card

response: Hello! If you need cash while traveling or away from home, Visa provides a Global ATM locator to help you find ATMs that accept Visa. You can also check with your bank to confirm your card is activated for overseas travel use and to review your daily ATM withdrawal limit and available balance. If you’re trying to use your Visa card and it isn’t working at an ATM or merchant, please share the exact error or situation so we can help narrow it down.
justification: Visa Travel Services | Visa Travel Credit Card Support says to use the Global ATM locator for cash access and to check card activation, withdrawal limits, and balance before travel. The ticket is vague about whether this is an ATM access issue or a general cash need, so a cautious reply with follow-up guidance is appropriate.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: Hi! If you choose to let Claude use your Claude Code sessions through the Development Partner Program, the data will be stored securely for up to two years. If you leave the program, any data already provided can still be stored for up to 2 years. If you meant consumer chats instead of Claude Code, you can adjust your privacy settings at any time, but the provided information does not specify a retention period for that setting.
justification: The title "About the Development Partner Program" states that data will be stored securely for up to two years and that previously provided data remains stored for up to 2 years after leaving the program. The title "I would like to input sensitive data into my chats with Claude. Who can view my conversations?" confirms privacy controls for consumer chats but does not give a retention duration.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: Hello! If you’re a professor setting this up for students, the Claude LTI integration is intended for Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators. In Canvas, you need to sign in as an administrator, create a Claude LTI developer key under Admin -> Developer Keys, install the app by client ID under Admin -> Settings -> Apps, and then enable Canvas in Claude for Education organization settings under Organization settings > Connectors. If you’re not an administrator for your institution’s Canvas or Claude for Education organization, you’ll need to work with the appropriate admin to complete the setup.
justification: The article "Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure" provides the setup steps and states they are intended for Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators. The ticket asks about setting up a Claude LTI key for students, which is covered by those admin setup instructions.
